display_text: Batrider Aghanim's Scepter: Flaming Lasso now grabs both its target and the nearest allied hero within 650 units. This upgrade counters split-push and teamfight positioning by allowing Batrider to disable two key enemy heroes simultaneously, drastically increasing his initiation impact in clustered engagements.
search_text: Batrider Aghanim Scepter anti-split-push teamfight control multi-hero disable initiation upgrade

display_text: Batrider Aghanim's Shard: Removes the stack limit on Sticky Napalm and allows it to damage structures. This upgrade counters turtling and high-ground defense by transforming Batrider into a siege threat, forcing enemies to engage or lose buildings to relentless stacking damage.
search_text: Batrider Aghanim Shard anti-turtle siege structure damage unlimited stacks Sticky Napalm
